hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: commit on %s. Per CLAUDE.md, never commit to the default branch. Branch first: git checkout -b feat/... then commit."}}\n' "$branch"; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: commit on %s. Per CLAUDE.md, never commit to the default branch. Branch first: git checkout -b feat/... then commit."}}\n' "$branch"; fi
